positive: A vibrant, minimalist depiction of a whimsical mountain range at dawn. The style is a harmonious blend of retro pop art and Scandinavian illustration, using bold, clean lines and solid color blocking. The scene features three distinct, stylized peaks silhouetted against a gradient sky of soft coral, pale yellow, and dusty blue. In the foreground, a simple, geometric meadow of abstracted wildflowers and stylized foliage adds depth. The overall composition is centrally balanced, optimized for a clean, high-contrast apparel print, with ample negative space around the edges. Studio lighting, vector illustration aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, sketch, photo, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, disfigured, messy, grayscale, muted colors
